headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Overweight on BXP, Lowers Price Target to $70
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Richard Anderson   maintains BXP (NYSE:BXP) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $79 to $70.

raw.headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Overweight on BXP, Lowers Price Target to $70
raw.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Richard Anderson   maintains BXP (NYSE:BXP) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $79 to $70.
